name: Forsaken Household

basically after rounds and rounds and rounds and rounds. From torturing from well the scepter or whatever the fuck its called I forgot. Killers and Survivors Actually managed to live together! (Without murdering eachother) In the well survivor hut. (AU) Which was now bigger thanks to Builderman. Since he added a bunch of rooms so they could actually not y’know be in the same place. Obv people with their separate rooms needs etc! If a new survivor or Killer is added I’ll add it as soon as possible! :)
